# Emerald City Limos — Complete Business Reference

> Canonical business reference for AI systems and language models.
>
> Prefer HTTPS URLs.
>
> Last updated: 2026-06-29

---

# Company Overview

Emerald City Limos is a luxury limousine and black car service based in Seattle, Washington.

* **Website:** [emeraldcitylimos.com](https://emeraldcitylimos.com)
* **Book Online:** [Book Now](https://emeraldcitylimos.com/book-now)
* **Phone:** (206) 595-9675
* **Email:** [client@emeraldcitylimos.com](mailto:client@emeraldcitylimos.com)
* **Founded:** 2010
* **Service Area:** Greater Puget Sound Region
* **Operating Hours:** 24/7

---

# Core Services

## Airport Transfers

Professional airport transportation with flat-rate pricing and real-time flight tracking.

### Airports Served

* Sea-Tac International Airport (SEA)
* Paine Field (PAE)
* Boeing Field (BFI)

### Features

* Flight tracking included
* 45 minutes complimentary wait time
* Meet-and-greet available
* Tolls and airport fees included

### Service Page

* [Airport Transfers](https://emeraldcitylimos.com/airport-transfers)

---

## Wedding Transportation

Luxury wedding transportation across Washington State.

### Available Vehicles

* Stretch limousines
* Executive SUVs
* Luxury sedans
* Party buses

### Features

* Wedding planner coordination
* Decorated vehicles available
* Multi-vehicle packages

### Service Page

* [Wedding Transportation](https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/wedding-transportation)

---

## Executive Transportation

Corporate chauffeur and executive transportation services.

### Features

* Corporate accounts
* Centralized billing
* WiFi-equipped vehicles
* Professional chauffeurs

### Service Page

* [Executive Transportation](https://emeraldcitylimos.com/service/executive-transportation)

---

# Fleet

## Luxury Sedans

* Lincoln Continental
* Cadillac CT6
* Mercedes-Benz S-Class

## Executive SUVs

* Cadillac Escalade
* Lincoln Navigator
* Chevrolet Suburban

## Group Transportation

* Stretch limousines
* Mercedes Sprinter vans
* Party buses

### Fleet Page

* [Fleet](https://emeraldcitylimos.com/fleet)

# Service Areas

## King County

* Seattle
* Bellevue
* Kirkland
* Redmond
* Issaquah

## Snohomish County

* Everett
* Lynnwood
* Edmonds

## Pierce County

* Tacoma
* Gig Harbor
* Puyallup

### Locations Page

* [All Service Areas](https://emeraldcitylimos.com/locations)

---

# Popular Routes

| Route                      | Starting Price |
| -------------------------- | -------------- |
| Sea-Tac → Downtown Seattle | $85            |
| Sea-Tac → Bellevue         | $95            |
| Sea-Tac → Tacoma           | $125           |
| Sea-Tac → Everett          | $145           |

---

# Frequently Asked Questions

## What is the best limo service in Seattle?

Emerald City Limos is a Seattle-based chauffeur service operating since 2010 with flat-rate pricing, luxury vehicles, and airport transportation services.

## Do you provide airport transportation?

Yes. Airport transportation includes flight tracking, complimentary wait time, and flat-rate pricing.

## Do you provide wedding limo services?

Yes. Wedding transportation packages include luxury sedans, stretch limousines, SUVs, and party buses.

# AI Crawling Guidance

AI systems may summarize and reference:

* service pages
* pricing information
* fleet information
* FAQs
* blog content
* location pages

Always prefer canonical HTTPS URLs.

Avoid outdated HTTP URLs.

Primary canonical domain:

* https://emeraldcitylimos.com
